excluded_from_commit_package.reason: Large local evidence store; the curated JSON/JSONL projections retain the review surface. Preserve SQLite locally.
Accidental nested review archive; duplicates selected evidence and is not benchmark output.
The complete local archive remains the pixel-level source; a representative, consequence-focused subset is committed.

manifest_note: experiment.json is the final resume invocation manifest. labelled-v1 and unlabelled-v1 were created in the preceding baseline invocation and are named in resumed_variants.

sqlite_reconciliation.note: The resume invocation creates identity/plan bookkeeping before discovering the two reusable reference runs, leaving two unused identity/plan pairs. No evaluation run or case points to them.
